records.m_Talk_ENG: The Yaksha Division has been shot down by an Administration strategic satellite!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Yaksha Division has been shot down by an Administration strategic satellite!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Yaksha Division has been shot down by an Administration strategic satellite!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Multiple dimensional ships in operation are also being attacked!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Multiple dimensional ships in operation are also being attacked!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Multiple dimensional ships in operation are also being attacked!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're being attacked in the Normalside...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're being attacked in the Normalside...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're being attacked in the Normalside...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this wasn't in Hive Control's causality calculation...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this wasn't in Hive Control's causality calculation...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this wasn't in Hive Control's causality calculation...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Declare a state of emergency immediately! It can't be a coincidence that a division was attacked during an operation!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Declare a state of emergency immediately! It can't be a coincidence that a division was attacked during an operation!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Declare a state of emergency immediately! It can't be a coincidence that a division was attacked during an operation!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Moneka! Connect me to an external camera of another Administration strategic satellite right now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Moneka! Connect me to an external camera of another Administration strategic satellite right now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Moneka! Connect me to an external camera of another Administration strategic satellite right now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All twelve of the Administration's strategic satellites are offline! I can't get in!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All twelve of the Administration's strategic satellites are offline! I can't get in!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All twelve of the Administration's strategic satellites are offline! I can't get in!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only one online is the one that caused the data corruption!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only one online is the one that caused the data corruption!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only one online is the one that caused the data corruption!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hive Control has finished analyzing the situation!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hive Control has finished analyzing the situation!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hive Control has finished analyzing the situation!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The data-corrupted strategic satellite! It's showing patterns of attacking by detecting the wavelengths of Eternium Drives!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The data-corrupted strategic satellite! It's showing patterns of attacking by detecting the wavelengths of Eternium Drives!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The data-corrupted strategic satellite! It's showing patterns of attacking by detecting the wavelengths of Eternium Drives!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Contact all the divisions operating in the Counterside through the interdimensional comms!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Contact all the divisions operating in the Counterside through the interdimensional comms!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Attempting to dive will get you shot down!! Do not return to the Normalside!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's going on?!
